headline: Date Set For Moody's Earnings Release And Investor Teleconference
summary: NEW YORK, July 08, 2026--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will release its second quarter 2026 results before the start of NYSE trading on Wednesday, July 22, 2026. A copy of the earnings release and supplemental presentation slides will be posted on Moody's Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com.
